rss.title: PS5 price hiked by £90 due to global 'pressures'
rss.snippet: The changes will see the recommended retail price of the PS5 rise from £479.99 to £569.99 in the UK.

rss.title: Lloyds bank reveals IT glitch affected almost half a million customers
rss.snippet: In a letter to the Treasury Select Committee, Lloyds apologised and said some compensation had been paid.

rss.title: Just Eat and Autotrader among firms investigated in fake reviews probe
rss.snippet: The UK's competition watchdog says it is looking at five firms in its investigation into misleading online reviews.
